idea.title: Wonderlings
idea.hook: Unwrap little gift-creatures with one-of-a-kind looks, then arrange them into living display scenes where every neighbour you place matters.
idea.prototype: Cozy surprise-gift collection + curation puzzle: unwrap a wrapped gift with a tactile ribbon-pull gesture to welcome a creature whose look is a unique combination (species x backdrop x coat-pattern x personal serial number); drag it onto a Haven grid where placement is a gentle spatial-harmony puzzle (matching terrain, satisfied creature preferences, friend adjacencies raise the room's Wonder); a tidy high-Wonder room fills a Joy meter that delivers the next gift; completing a themed set deterministically unlocks the next room. No reel, no odds UI, no coin economy, no fail state.
idea.mutation_of: Telegram collectible gifts (trait-combination unique digital gifts) crossed with cozy diorama/sticker-album curation
idea.why_novel: The portfolio's four existing collectibles are all casino-shaped: critter_crates and gem_cases are spin-reel openers with near-miss engineering and sell-dupes-for-coins; orb_legion and starbound_hearts are gacha summon banners with pity + battle/affinity. Wonderlings deletes the casino entirely. There is no spinning reel, no percentages/odds UI, no rarity ladder to chase and no coin economy. The open is a 2-3s tactile UNWRAP gesture; collectibles are multi-axis trait COMBINATIONS (species x backdrop x pattern x serial number = the Telegram-collectible-gift uniqueness signature, far more collection surface than a flat 5-tier album); and the GAME is a spatial-harmony PLACEMENT puzzle where skillful curation - never payment and never luck - earns the next gift. First non-gambling, non-combat, cozy-curation collectible for us.
idea.non_timer_pressure: resource scarcity (a Haven holds fewer display slots than you own creatures, forcing display-vs-reserve choices) plus spatial placement constraints (creature preferences conflict, so you cannot greedily cluster everything)
idea.lose_condition: none by design - cozy no-fail. Pressure is scarce display slots + the Zeigarnik pull of incomplete sets, not a terminal GAMEOVER state. Rearranging is always free.

sources.title: Safe loot-box / Telegram-gifts-inspired collectible
sources.snippet: Design a safe loot-box / Telegram-gifts-inspired collectible game using gift boxes/creatures/relics/stickers/cosmetics; avoid weapons, cash-out, trading, real gambling language, paid chance. Reference critter_crates/gem_cases only to avoid duplication.

sources.title: Telegram collectible gifts
sources.snippet: Telegram collectible gifts are unique by a COMBINATION of model + backdrop + symbol + a serial number - the trait-combination uniqueness this game adopts as its rarity model (cosmetic, non-transferable, no value).

sources.title: critter_crates (183) + gem_cases (130)
sources.snippet: Both are case_opener-class spin-reel openers with near-miss + sell-dupes-for-coins; dedupe_check passes 'wonderlings' (exit 0, no mechanic-class match). Wonderlings differentiates by deleting the reel/odds/coin economy and centering a placement puzzle.

synthesizer_brief: Direct design-brief build (2026-06-18, manual /game-factory). Brief asked for a SAFE loot-box/Telegram-gifts collectible avoiding gambling mechanics. Design was Codex-reviewed before build: progression is deterministic (Wonder unlocks known content; gifts bias toward unowned set members so completion is guaranteed by play, never odds), randomness is cosmetic-only (which trait combo, never a power tier), rewarded video grants only deterministic/known rewards, external-link gifting is held out of the Yandex build, and a moderation-safe copy deck avoids loot/box/case/pull/roll/gacha/pity/banner/drop/odds/jackpot/limited/exclusive. v0.1 ships the addictive core loop (unwrap + multi-axis reveal + Haven harmony placement + sets + deterministic room unlock); overnight idle, dupe-crafting, festival, gifting and IAP are deferred to the iteration ladder.

alternatives.title: Giftlings
alternatives.why_novel: passes dedupe_check; 'Wonderlings' chosen for the wonder/whimsy read

alternatives.title: Curio Grove
alternatives.hook: Welcome wandering creatures into a grove and complete wonder-filled collection scenes
alternatives.why_novel: passes dedupe_check; deprioritised - 'grove' over-narrows the theme to one biome
